moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships are in their final thrilling days, culminating with the Ladies' Singles Final on Saturday and the Gentlemen's Singles Final on Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Finals Fever
angles.copy: Centre Court drama is at its peak! Who are you backing for the Wimbledon titles this weekend? The tension is palpable!

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The SW19 buzz is electric! Wimbledon finals weekend is here – soak up the atmosphere, even if you're not court-side.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: Much of the UK, especially the South East, is experiencing a heatwave with London forecast for 30°C+ temperatures through the weekend and into next week.

angles.name: Keep Cool
angles.copy: Another scorcher for many! Remember to stay hydrated and find some shade as the heatwave rolls on. What's your top tip for keeping cool?

angles.name: London Heat
angles.copy: London is absolutely baking! Temperatures well into the 30s today. Send us your best heatwave hacks!

moments.title: Tour de France Mid-Race
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is well underway, with cyclists battling through stages across France until July 26.

angles.name: Gruelling Stages
angles.copy: The Tour de France keeps delivering incredible drama! Who's impressing you in the peloton as they tackle more gruelling stages?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival
moments.blurb: Alexandra Palace Park in London hosts the Kaleidoscope Festival tomorrow, July 11, with a lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Party
angles.copy: Get ready for Kaleidoscope Festival at Ally Pally tomorrow! Who are you buzzing to see on stage?

moments.title: Lost Minds Festival
moments.blurb: Lost Minds Festival brings a huge dance and electronic lineup to Newcastle tomorrow, July 11, for a day of non-stop beats.

angles.name: Newcastle Beats
angles.copy: Lost Minds Festival hits Newcastle tomorrow! North East, are you ready to lose yourselves on the dancefloor?

moments.title: The Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship (golf) begins on Thursday, July 16, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Major Golf
angles.copy: The oldest major in golf is almost here! The Open Championship tees off at Royal Birkdale next week. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival runs from July 15-18 in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, bringing a unique blend of music and culture to Scotland.

angles.name: Scottish Vibes
angles.copy: Heading to the Hebridean Celtic Festival next week? Stornoway is set to come alive with incredible music and atmosphere!

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: World-class athletes descend on the London Stadium for the London Athletics Meet on Saturday, July 18.

angles.name: Track & Field
angles.copy: The London Athletics Meet is just over a week away! Get ready for a day of incredible track and field action at the London Stadium.

moments.title: Happy 76th, Greg Kihn!
moments.blurb: American rock musician Greg Kihn, known for hits like 'The Breakup Song (They Don't Write 'Em)', turns 76 today, July 10.

angles.name: Breakup Song Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 76th Birthday to Greg Kihn! Still love cranking 'The Breakup Song' to full volume. What's your favourite Kihn track?

moments.title: Happy 87th, Mavis Staples!
moments.blurb: The legendary gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, known for her powerful voice and work with The Staple Singers, celebrates her 87th birthday today, July 10.

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: An absolute icon turns 87 today! Happy Birthday to the incredible Mavis Staples. Her voice is pure soul.

moments.title: Happy 36th, Olly Alexander!
moments.blurb: Years & Years frontman and recent Eurovision sensation Olly Alexander celebrates his 36th birthday on Wednesday, July 15.

angles.name: Pop Star Bday
angles.copy: Get ready to wish Olly Alexander a very Happy 36th Birthday next Wednesday! What's your favourite Years & Years track?

moments.title: Happy 80th, Linda Ronstadt!
moments.blurb: The legendary singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile career spanning rock, country, and pop, turns 80 on Wednesday, July 15.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: A true music icon, Linda Ronstadt, celebrates her 80th birthday next week! Her voice defined so many eras.

moments.title: Happy 82nd, Millie Jackson!
moments.blurb: The outspoken and influential R&B and soul singer Millie Jackson celebrates her 82nd birthday on Wednesday, July 15.

angles.name: Soulful Legend
angles.copy: The one-of-a-kind Millie Jackson turns 82 next Wednesday! A true legend of soul music. What's your favourite of her tracks?

moments.title: Happy 74th, Stewart Copeland!
moments.blurb: The incredible drummer for The Police, Stewart Copeland, celebrates his 74th birthday on Thursday, July 16.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: The rhythmic force behind The Police, Stewart Copeland, turns 74 next Thursday! What a drumming legend.

moments.title: Happy 63rd, Richard Marx!
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Richard Marx, known for classic hits like 'Right Here Waiting' and 'Hazard', celebrates his 63rd birthday on Thursday, July 16.

angles.name: Power Ballad King
angles.copy: Get ready to sing along! Richard Marx turns 63 next Thursday. What's your favourite power ballad from him?

moments.title: Spencer Davis would have been 87
moments.blurb: Spencer Davis, the Welsh musician and founder of The Spencer Davis Group, who gave us hits like 'Keep On Running', would have been 87 on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Welsh Music Legend
angles.copy: Remembering Welsh music legend Spencer Davis, who would have been 87 this Friday. His legacy with The Spencer Davis Group lives on!

angles.name: Keep On Running
angles.copy: Thinking of Spencer Davis, who would have turned 87 on Friday. 'Keep On Running' is still an absolute banger!

moments.title: Happy 41st, Tom Fletcher!
moments.blurb: McFly co-frontman, guitarist, and author Tom Fletcher celebrates his 41st birthday on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: McFly Star
angles.copy: Wishing a huge Happy 41st Birthday to McFly's very own Tom Fletcher this Friday! What's your favourite McFly song?

moments.title: Happy 77th, Geezer Butler!
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Metal Icon
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Geezer Butler! A true pioneer of heavy metal with Black Sabbath.

moments.title: Splendour Festival
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Wollaton Hall & Deer Park hosts Splendour Festival on July 18-19, featuring multiple stages and diverse genres.

angles.name: Notts Festival
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is just over a week away in Nottingham! Who's joining the party at Wollaton Hall?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaching
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating 20 years, returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, featuring music, comedy, arts, and more.

angles.name: Suffolk Summer
angles.copy: Counting down the days to Latitude Festival! Suffolk, are you ready for a massive weekend of music and arts?
